subcodes.first_line: Though the events of the time and the manifestations of trials have cast a shadow upon the hearts, yet pure hearts and sanctified souls [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اگرچه حوادث زمان و ظهورات افتتان قلوب را مکدر نموده ولکن افئده صافیه و نفوس
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @chastisement and requital, @love of God
